title: TIMING BELT

figures_detected.description: Hand checking belt tensioner and idler for smooth turning
Sprockets with arrows showing direction of rotation and locking pins fitted
Timing belt installation order showing crankshaft, idler pulley, injection pump sprocket and camshaft sprocket with direction arrow
Timing belt pretensioning showing SST KV109B0030 and KV109B0080 in use on tensioner

steps.text: Check belt tensioner and idler for smooth turning.

content_blocks.text: Confirm that the flywheel, camshaft and injection pump locking pins are still fitted.

steps.text: Loosen the camshaft and injection pump sprocket bolts slightly.
Check that the sprockets rotate freely on their hubs.
Turn the sprockets in the direction of engine rotation (clockwise) to the end of their slots.
Install timing belt in the following order beginning at the crankshaft over the idler pulley to the injection pump sprocket.
notes: Point arrow on timing belt towards engine rotation (clockwise).

steps.text: Turn the injection pump sprocket slightly anti-clockwise to engage the timing belt teeth.
Follow the same procedure for the camshaft sprocket.
notes: Angular travel of the sprocket, with respect to the timing belt, must not be greater than one belt tooth.

steps.text: Engage the belt on the tensioner pulley and water pump.

content_blocks.text: Confirm that the flywheel, camshaft and injection pump locking pins are still fitted.

steps.text: Install SST KV109B0030 on the edge of the belt. Take care not to obstruct any other component. Tighten the screw on the tool until a loud click is heard.
Rotate the tensioner counter-clockwise to obtain a reading of: 98 SEEM units for a new belt; 75 SEEM units for a used belt. Tighten the tensioners nut to the specified torque. Remove SST KV109B0030.

tools_referenced.name: Belt tension measuring tool / SST
tools_referenced.usage: Install on edge of timing belt to measure tension; tighten screw until loud click is heard, then remove after tensioning

tools_referenced.name: Tensioner tool / SST
tools_referenced.usage: Used in conjunction with KV109B0030 during timing belt pretensioning

model_notes: VJZ engine variant. Procedure covers diesel engine with injection pump sprocket.
